name: construction contractors managing 5–15 projects simultaneously tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5–15 projects simultaneously, inefficient tracking of equipment usage causes underutilization. We provide automated utilization reports instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: inefficient tracking of equipment usage leading to underutilization
